headline: Your Devices Just Got a Brain.
subheadline: HeadyOS is the sovereign AI operating layer that runs beneath every device — mobile, desktop, embedded, and edge. A persistent agent runtime that thinks, remembers, and acts on your behalf, continuously, without cloud dependency.
body: Built on a TypeScript/Node.js core and compiled to native binaries via Bun, HeadyOS deploys the full Heady agent stack directly on your hardware. From Raspberry Pi to enterprise Linux clusters, HeadyOS brings φ-scaled intelligence to any substrate — with zero-latency local inference, a quantum-safe secure enclave, and OTA updates that never interrupt operation.

output: HeadyOS is running. Type 'heady --help' to begin.
